title: aphanes pinnata
intro: Aphanes pinnata, also known as the lesser trefoil or lesser clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, valued for its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aphanes pinnata include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Aphanes pinnata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
